name: codedb (default MCP)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY via Bash:
- /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-negq/zig-out/bin/codedb /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react search <query>
- /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-negq/zig-out/bin/codedb /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react find <name>
- /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-negq/zig-out/bin/codedb /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react word <ident>
- /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-negq/zig-out/bin/codedb /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react outline <relpath>
Forbidden: Read, grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, lean-ctx, sqlite3, any mcp__*.

name: codedb (LEAN env + paths-only flag)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY via Bash. All codedb invocations should set CODEDB_QUIET=1; use --paths-only on search when only locations matter:
- CODEDB_QUIET=1 /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-negq/zig-out/bin/codedb /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react search [--paths-only] <query>
- CODEDB_QUIET=1 /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-negq/zig-out/bin/codedb /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react find <name>
- CODEDB_QUIET=1 /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-negq/zig-out/bin/codedb /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react word <ident>
- CODEDB_QUIET=1 /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-negq/zig-out/bin/codedb /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react outline <relpath>
Forbidden: Read, grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, lean-ctx, sqlite3, any mcp__*.

name: SQLite FTS5 (trigram tokenizer)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY:
- sqlite3 /tmp/codedb-bench/fts5_trigram.db "SELECT ..." via Bash
- Read (built-in tool, for reading any matched file)
Forbidden: grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, codedb, lean-ctx, any mcp__*.
Query syntax: substring match wrapped in double-quoted MATCH expression. Example:
  sqlite3 /tmp/codedb-bench/fts5_trigram.db "SELECT path FROM files WHERE files MATCH '\"useState\"' LIMIT 10"
Use bm25(files) for ranking, snippet(files, 1, '>>', '<<', '...', 8) for previews.

name: lean-ctx (CLI)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY via Bash (cd into corpus first):
- cd /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react && lean-ctx grep <pattern>
- cd /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react && lean-ctx find <pattern>
- cd /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react && lean-ctx read <relpath>
- cd /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react && lean-ctx read <relpath> -m signatures
- cd /Users/blackfloofie/codedb-bench/react && lean-ctx ls <relpath>
Forbidden: Read, grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, codedb, sqlite3, any mcp__*.
